name: laraq
description: Generate, validate, and execute BigDFT Python code from natural-language queries via RAG research and subagent-driven analysis. Remote/HPC execution uses the remotemanager plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and run BigDFT Python code from natural-language requests.
interface.longDescription: Generate, validate, dry-run, and execute BigDFT Python code from natural-language queries using RAG research over the BigDFT documentation and subagent-driven analysis (intent extraction, physics-parameter extraction, feasibility checking, query expansion, code generation). Remote/HPC execution is handled by the remotemanager plugin, not laraq itself.
defaultPrompt: Create a helium atom at position [2.0, 0.0, 0.0] in bohr and print its position in angstrom.
Check if computing the ionization potential of water is feasible.
Generate BigDFT code to build a water molecule and compute its total energy.
